title: Geissorhiza erosa
taxonomy: Geissorhiza erosa is classified as a member of the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including Iridoideae and Geisseirioideae. Within the Iridoideae subfamily, Geissorhiza erosa is a part of tribe Irideae. The Irideae tribe is a large and diverse group, containing many species of irises and related plants. The classification of Geissorhiza erosa reflects its evolutionary history and relationships with other members of the iris family.
